title: The Interest Act, 1978
full_text: The Interest Act, 1978 ब्‍याज अधिनियम,1978 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197814 Act Number: 14 Enactment Date: 1978-03-31 Act Year: 1978 Short Title: The Interest Act, 1978 Hindi Title: ब्‍याज अधिनियम,1978 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the allowance of interest in certain cases. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 19-08-1981 Notification: 19th August 1981, vide notification No. S.O. 657(E), dated 19th August, 1981, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Interest Act, 1978 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power of court to allow interest. Section 4. Interest payable under certain enactments. Section 5. Section 34 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 to apply. Section 6. Repeal and saving.
